response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist engineer (18+ years) with current, directly relevant work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, strong TypeScript/Node depth, and a consulting/teaching background that suits customer-facing delivery. However, he falls well short of the role's core requirement of 8+ years building production AI solutions — his GenAI exposure spans roughly one year — and the resume shows no Python, vector database, RAG, or evaluation-pipeline experience, all central to this staff-level GenAI position.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience in his current staff-level role
18+ years of production software engineering across web, backend, embedded, and low-latency systems
Consulting, workshop, and mentoring background that maps well to forward-deployed, customer-facing work
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related experience versus the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Limited demonstrated experience leading technical discovery with enterprise stakeholders at scale

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python evidence
